data.title: Smart Money Is Betting Big In RGTI Options
Biden Blocks $14.9B US Steel Takeover, Shares Plunge (UPDATED)
data.description: President Joe Biden blocked the $14.9 billion acquisition of United States Steel Corp. (NYSE: X) by Nippon Steel Corp. (OTC: NPSCY), citing national security risks. Biden emphasized the vital role of domestic steel in supporting U.S. infrastructure and defense.

data.title: US Manufacturing Activity Tops Expectations In December, Rises To 9-Month Highs
data.description: U.S. manufacturing sector shows signs of improvement in December. PMI rises to 49.3%, strongest since April 2024. Dollar rebounds on positive data.
